requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — NFPA 855, Typhoon-Resilience Derating, and State Utility Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——NFPA 855、颶風韧性降额与州级验收
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——NFPA 855、颶風韌性降額與州級驗收

summary.en: Fire safety for BESS installations in the FSM is governed by a combination of NFPA codes used in US-heritage 60 Hz markets and project requirements enforced by the state public utilities and DRD. NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) is the dominant BESS fire-installation reference for equipment that is evaluated against U.S.-aligned engineering practice. Formal local adoption of NFPA 855 for stationary BESS has not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date; this is a high-priority gap requiring direct verification with the state utility and DRD before project design is finalised. NFPA 855 requires UL 9540A fire-propagation evidence to determine safe installation spacing, container separation distances, and automatic suppression design. FSM is a hurricane- and typhoon-prone archipelago; design drivers include coastal corrosion, wind loading, and flood risk for low-elevation sites. Projects should confirm enclosure IP and wind-rated mounting standards with the specific state utility approval process (Pohnpei Utilities Corporation, Chuuk Public Utility Corporation, and equivalents).
summary.zh: FSM的BESS消防安全由NFPA规范及州级公用事业和DRD项目要求共同管控。NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）是按美国沿袭工程实践评估设备时主要参考；截至本数据集日期，尚未从可公开获取的官方来源确认FSM已就固定式BESS正式采纳NFPA 855；这是高优先级差距，须在项目设计最终确定前由州公用事业与DRD直接核实。NFPA 855要求UL 9540A消防蔓延证据以确定安全安装间距、集装箱隔离距离和自动抑制设计。FSM属于飓风/台风多发群岛，沿海腐蚀、抗风、风暴潮和洪水风险是设计驱动；项目应在特定州公用事业验收流程（波奈佩公共事业公司、楚克公共事业公司等）中确认机柜防护等级和抗风设计标准。
summary.zht: FSM的BESS消防安全由NFPA規範及州級公共事業和DRD項目要求共同管控。NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）是按美國沿襲工程實務評估設備時的主要參照；截至本數據集日期，尚未從可公開取得的官方來源確認FSM已就固定式BESS正式採納NFPA 855；這是高優先級差距，需在項目設計最終確認前由州公共事業與DRD直接核實。NFPA 855要求UL 9540A消防蔓延證據來確定安全安裝間距、設備隔離距離及自動抑制設計。FSM屬颶風/台風多發群島，沿海腐蝕、抗風、風暴潮與淹水風險皆為設計驅動；項目應在特定州公共事業驗收流程（Pohnpei公用事業公司、Chuuk公共事業公司等）中確認機櫃防護等級與抗風設計標準。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (dominant BESS fire-installation reference in US-aligned project practice; formal FSM adoption for BESS specifically should be confirmed directly with DRD and state utilities)
UL 9540A — Test Method for Evaluating Thermal Runaway Fire Propagation in Battery Energy Storage Systems (fire-propagation data required by NFPA 855 for installation spacing and suppression design)
NFPA 13 — Standard for the Installation of Sprinkler Systems (fire suppression reference in US-heritage engineering practice)
NFPA 72 — National Fire Alarm and Signaling Code (fire alarm reference in US-heritage engineering practice)
ASCE 7 — Minimum Design Loads and Associated Criteria for Buildings and Other Structures (wind-load design basis used in hurricane-prone island conditions)
State utility technical inspectors and DRD — utility service-connection, permit, and coastal infrastructure context

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. These documents remain useful for Chinese domestic design, but they are not automatically accepted for FSM in place of NFPA-based installation evidence. Chinese enclosure standards do not incorporate FSM typhoon-coastal wind and flood derating requirements.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级审查管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023涵盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。上述中国文件对中国国内设计有帮助，但不能在FSM项目中直接替代基于NFPA的消防安装证据。中国的机柜标准未纳入FSM所需的台风与沿海风暴潮降额要求。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級審查管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯與模組之消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023與GB/T 36558-2023涵蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。上述中國文件對中國國內設計有幫助，但不能在FSM項目中直接替代基於NFPA的消防安裝證據。中國之機櫃標準未納入FSM所需之颶風/沿海風暴潮降額要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (system-level safety including fire-related requirements)
GB/T 4208 — 外壳防护等级（IP代码）(IP Protection Ratings — equivalent to IEC 60529; relevant for enclosure ingress protection against rainfall and flooding but wind-load design is separate)

gap.en: Gap: two dimensions. First, FSM practice treats fire-safety installation through project acceptance tied to DRD and state utilities rather than a single national certifying pathway. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy NFPA-based project design expectations. Exporters and project teams should: (a) confirm local acceptance status with DRD and the relevant state utility before design freeze; (b) prepare installation spacing, suppression, gas detection or ventilation, and emergency shutdown evidence aligned to NFPA 855 and UL 9540A; (c) confirm enclosure storm and flood resilience assumptions for Pohnpei and other high-exposure islands; (d) use US-heritage protective devices and installation methods where required by the state utility specification. Second, hurricane resilience is a practical must: verify structural anchoring, uplift resistance, salt-mist corrosion, and elevated installation practices before permit and energisation.
gap.zh: 差距包括两个方面。第一，FSM实践中消防安全安装与DRD和州公用事业的项目验收流程绑定，而不是由单一全国性认证路径覆盖；中国GB标准文件不能满足NFPA项目设计要求。出口商和项目团队应： (a) 在设计冻结前向DRD及相关州公用事业确认本地验收状态；(b) 按NFPA 855与UL 9540A准备安装间距、抑制系统、气体检测/通风及紧急停机证据；(c) 对波奈佩及其他高暴露岛屿确认防风防洪机柜假设；(d) 依据州公用事业规范使用美国体系防护和安装方法。第二，颶风韧性是实操性要求：在许可和并网前应核实结构锚固、抗风阻拔、盐雾腐蚀和抬高安装措施。
gap.zht: 差距包括兩個面向。第一，FSM實務上消防安全安裝與DRD及州公共事業之項目驗收流程綁定，而非由單一全國性認證路徑涵蓋；中國GB標準文件不能滿足NFPA項目設計要求。出口商及項目團隊應：(a) 在設計凍結前向DRD及相關州公共事業確認本地驗收狀態；(b) 依NFPA 855與UL 9540A準備安裝間距、抑制系統、氣體偵測/通風及緊急停機證據；(c) 對波奈佩及其他高暴露島嶼確認防颶風、防洪機櫃假設；(d) 依州公共事業規範採用美國體系保護及安裝方法。第二，颶風韌性是實際必備要求：在許可及併網前應核實結構錨固、抗風阻拔、鹽霧腐蝕及抬高安裝措施。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but practically mandatory where utility or safety permit, DRD oversight, and local permitting requirements apply; NFPA-based fire-safety design is expected in many 60 Hz projects
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic project approval and fire-review requirements are not direct substitutes for FSM project permits, typhoon-risk design, or DRD/state utility conditions

source.publisher: Department of Resources and Development (DRD), Federated States of Micronesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat NFPA 855 and UL 9540A as project-baseline expectations for FSM when referenced in state utility and DRD acceptance. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety files should be treated as domestic Chinese baseline evidence only. Verify typhoon-wind and flood-resilience assumptions for each FSM site and engage the relevant state utility and DRD before final procurement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 当州公用事业与DRD验收要求NFPA 855与UL 9540A时，应把其视为FSM项目基线预期。中国GB标准消防文件仅作为中国国内基线证据。请为每个FSM站点核验颱風風載與防洪韌性假设，并在采购定稿前与相关州公用事业及DRD确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 當州公共事業與DRD驗收要求NFPA 855與UL 9540A時，應將其視為FSM項目基線預期。中國GB標準消防文件僅作為中國國內基線證據。請為每個FSM據點核驗颶風風載與防洪韌性假設，並於採購定稿前與相關州公共事業及DRD確認。
